name: Gouki Tagpartner
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ツープラトン
desc: If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Gouki" monster: You can have that "Gouki" Link Monster gain 1000 ATK until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Gouki" Spell in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Gouki" monster: You can have that "Gouki" Link Monster gain 1000 ATK until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Gouki" Spell in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Gouki" monster: You can have that "Gouki" Link Monster gain 1000 ATK until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Gouki" Spell in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck.

action: Activates if used as Link Material
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
